about.seoTitle: About AtmosMind - The Future of AI Weather Intelligence
about.seoDescription: Learn how AtmosMind combines AI and real-time climate data to deliver trusted, practical weather intelligence for daily life and travel planning.
about.title: About Us
about.mainParagraph: At AtmosMind, we're redefining how you perceive and interact with weather. More than just an ordinary weather forecast, AtmosMind is your personal AI-powered climate intelligence assistant. Imagine being able to ask our AI detailed questions about any location on Earth, and receiving personalized, context-aware recommendations based on both current and future weather patterns. Whether you're planning a trip, optimizing your daily commute, or simply curious about the world around you, AtmosMind provides the deep insights you need to make informed decisions.
about.qa1A: AtmosMind is a weather intelligence application that combines real-time forecasts with AI interpretation so users can quickly understand what conditions mean for their daily decisions.
about.qa2A: Instead of presenting only numbers, AtmosMind explains likely weather impacts, suggests what to wear, and recommends weather-appropriate activities based on current and upcoming patterns.
about.qa3A: AtmosMind is built for clarity, speed, and practical actionability. It merges verified weather data and AI-guided summaries to support confident travel, commute, and day-to-day planning.

privacy.seoTitle: Privacy Policy - AtmosMind AI Weather Dashboard
privacy.seoDescription: Read AtmosMind's privacy practices, including data collection, usage, security standards, and user rights for AI-powered weather services.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introductionBody: This Privacy Policy explains how AtmosMind collects, uses, and safeguards information when you use our platform. Our goal is to provide transparent practices and maintain trust while delivering intelligent weather insights.
privacy.collectBody: Depending on how you interact with AtmosMind, we may process the following categories of information:
privacy.collectItem1: Search inputs and weather-related queries entered in the application.
privacy.collectItem2: Approximate or explicit location data used to provide weather forecasts.
privacy.collectItem3: Technical usage data such as device type, browser details, and interaction logs.
privacy.usageBody: We use collected information to operate and improve the platform, including the delivery of relevant forecasts and personalized AI guidance.
privacy.usageItem1: Provide accurate weather content and location-based recommendations.
privacy.usageItem2: Enhance response quality for AI-powered suggestions and insights.
privacy.usageItem3: Monitor performance, prevent misuse, and improve overall user experience.
privacy.securityBody: AtmosMind applies standard administrative, technical, and organizational security measures designed to protect data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: AtmosMind may rely on third-party APIs and infrastructure providers to deliver core functionality, such as weather data and AI services. These providers operate under their own privacy terms and policies.
privacy.rightsBody: You may have rights regarding access, correction, deletion, or restriction of your personal data depending on your jurisdiction. You can also choose to limit certain data-sharing features by adjusting your usage preferences.
